◎简　　介  

　　改编自Daphne du Maurier的小说Jamaica InnSet in 1820 against the backdrop of the windswept Cornish moors, the story follows Mary’s journey when she is forced to live with an aunt at the eponymous inn after the death of her mother and discovers it to be the hub of a smuggling ring.
